'''mahava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynatron|dynatron]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynatron|dynatron]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mahava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæhævæth|mæhævæth]] || [[word:mæhævæj|mæhævæj]] || [[word:mæhævæsh|mæhævæsh]] || [[word:mæhævæ|mæhævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mahahavath|mahahavath]] || [[word:mahahavaj|mahahavaj]] || [[word:mahahavash|mahahavash]] || [[word:mahahava|mahahava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mahavath|mahavath]] || [[word:mahavaj|mahavaj]] || [[word:mahavash|mahavash]] || [[word:mahava|mahava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mahafvath|mahafvath]] || [[word:mahafvaj|mahafvaj]] || [[word:mahafvash|mahafvash]] || [[word:mahafvaf|mahafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mahavatha|mahavatha]] || [[word:mahavaja|mahavaja]] || [[word:mahavasha|mahavasha]] || [[word:mahavaka|mahavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mahavath|mahavath]] || [[word:mahavaj|mahavaj]] || [[word:mahavash|mahavash]] || [[word:mahava|mahava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mahavathal|mahavathal]] || [[word:mahavajal|mahavajal]] || [[word:mahavashal|mahavashal]] || [[word:mahavakal|mahavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mahavathatha|mahavathatha]] || [[word:mahavajaja|mahavajaja]] || [[word:mahavashasha|mahavashasha]] || [[word:mahavaka|mahavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mahavathan|mahavathan]] || [[word:mahavajan|mahavajan]] || [[word:mahavashan|mahavashan]] || [[word:mahavakan|mahavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mahavathaoro|mahavathaoro]] || [[word:mahavajaoro|mahavajaoro]] || [[word:mahavashaoro|mahavashaoro]] || [[word:mahavakaoro|mahavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
